A filter is applied to this layer using: A filter is applied to this layer using a CQL2 query. Only features matching this query will be included in clipping.
Add Mapbox Vector Tiles by URL: Add Mapbox Vector Tiles by URL
An input will be shown to toggle the cho: An input will be shown to toggle the chosen layer on the map.
Are you sure you want to delete this geo: Are you sure you want to delete this geography?
Are you sure you want to discard your ch: Are you sure you want to discard your changes?
Choose an image to upload, along with op: Choose an image to upload, along with optional alternate text for accessibility. You can also drag & drop images to the editor, though you will not be able to specify alt text that way.
Customized labels will appear in the tab: Customized labels will appear in the table, replacing default values.
Drop a file to update this layer: Drop a file to update this layer
Error importing service. Could not gener: Error importing service. Could not generate thumbnail image
If provided, a column will appear in the: If provided, a column will appear in the table with inputs for toggling linked data layers on the map. These may be the same layer used in the analysis, or in a different derivative visualization layer of your choosing.

Label: Label
Label appears above categories. Enter a: Label appears above categories. Enter a space to hide.
Labels the color scale. Use a space to h: Labels the color scale. Use a space to hide.
Map tiles will be displayed below all ov: Map tiles will be displayed below all overlay layers, and the basemap is accessible from the Maps tab.
Name: Name
No data was found at the provided URL. C: No data was found at the provided URL. Check the URL and try again.
No map services in this folder: No map services in this folder
No vector layers found. Disable vector r: No vector layers found. Disable vector request preference to see raster layers.
Only area within this layer will be incl: Only area within this layer will be included in the geography.
Parts of shapefiles cannot be uploaded d: Parts of shapefiles cannot be uploaded directly. To upload a shapefile, create a zipfile (.zip) with all related sidecar files (.shp, .prj, .shx, etc). At a minimum, your upload will need to contain the geometry file (.shp) and the projection file (.prj).
Please enter a name for the geography.
Rows can be added to this table by using: Rows can be added to this table by using the "Group by" option, adding multiple sources, or some combination.
SeaSketch currently supports vector data: SeaSketch currently supports vector data in GeoJSON, Shapefile (zipped), GeoTiff, NetCDF and FlatGeobuf formats.
The <2>PMTiles</2> format is an archive: The <2>PMTiles</2> format is an archive of all the tiles used to render this layer in SeaSketch.
The following list includes all attribut: The following list includes all attributes that the bound filter service supports. Choose attributes you would like to filter on, and SeaSketch will create new form fields to support filtering these attributes. Those form fields can then be customized and sorted as needed.
This GeoJSON contains a GeometryCollecti: This GeoJSON contains a GeometryCollection. It may not render as expected.
This GeoJSON is over 1MB and may take a: This GeoJSON is over 1MB and may take a long time to load. Consider downloading the data and uploading to SeaSketch so that it can be tiled.
This GeoJSON took over 2 seconds to load: This GeoJSON took over 2 seconds to load. Consider downloading the data and uploading to SeaSketch for better performance.
This action cannot be undone. Related da: This action cannot be undone. Related data layers will remain in the table of contents until you remove them.
This appears to be a file type which Sea: This appears to be a file type which SeaSketch does not support for spatial uploads.
This appears to be an unsupported raster: This appears to be an unsupported raster file type. For raster data, upload a GeoTiff.
This area will be removed from the geogr: This area will be removed from the geography.
This dataset only supports the currently: This dataset only supports the currently selected visualization type
This layer will be toggled when the user: This layer will be toggled when the user clicks the visibility checkbox for this geography.
This name is visible within the administ: This name is visible within the administrative interface when configuring sketch classes, and used as a default label if this geography if used in reports.
This response contains cache directives: This response contains cache directives instructing users to re-download the dataset each time it is displayed. Consider using long-lived cache headers to improve performance.
This service has already been added to y: This service has already been added to your project's table of contents. Are you sure you want to import it again?
To replace a layer, upload a single file: To replace a layer, upload a single file that will replace the existing layer. Close the data source editor if you would like to create new layers.
Uncheck any rows you would like to exclu: Uncheck any rows you would like to exclude from the table.
Use this option if you would like to dis: Use this option if you would like to display these map tiles over an existing basemap. Best for tiled layers with alpha transparency.
Used to append text to values in the leg: Used to append text to values in the legend.
When 'auto' is specified, the geography: When 'auto' is specified, the geography used to clip the sketch will be used.
You can only upload one file to update a: You can only upload one file to update a layer.
You can speed up the process of finding: You can speed up the process of finding tileset boundaries by moving the map to the approximate location of the dataset.
